money_flow_summary: Software companies charge recurring subscription fees (MRR/ARR) for access to tools that automate workflows. Money flows from business buyers to software vendors who capture 60-80% gross margins by selling bits instead of time. In 2026, AI has compressed the cost to build SaaS from $500k+ to under $10k — solo founders can now build niche B2B tools in days and distribute them globally via product-led growth.

top_opportunities.title: Vertical AI Agent for a Specific SMB Type (e.g., Dental Offices)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Pick one vertical (dental, HVAC, law firms, real estate agents) and build an AI agent that handles their specific top 3 pain points: e.g., for dental offices — AI appointment reminder caller, insurance pre-auth automation, no-show follow-up. Charge $299-$999/mo. With 100 clients = $30k-$100k MRR. Dental offices alone: 200k+ in the US, deeply underserved by software.
top_opportunities.moat: Vertical specialization creates switching cost; integrations with industry-specific software (Dentrix, etc.) create deep lock-in
top_opportunities.first_step: Interview 5 dental office managers this week; identify their #1 manual task; build MVP in 2 weekends using Twilio + GPT-4o
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI makes outbound appointment reminder calls in natural voice, handles patient questions, and records outcomes — replacing a $25/hr front desk task that runs 20+ hrs/week

top_opportunities.title: AI Document Intelligence Platform for Professional Services
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a system that ingests PDF contracts, financial statements, and legal documents via API or upload, extracts structured data (dates, dollar amounts, obligations, parties), and surfaces action items. Target law firms, accounting firms, and real estate companies who process 50-500 documents/week. Charge $299-$1,499/mo based on volume. Average customer saves 10+ hours/week at $100+/hr fully-loaded cost.
top_opportunities.moat: Domain-specific prompt templates per document type create accuracy advantage; integrations with practice management software create lock-in
top_opportunities.first_step: Build PDF → structured JSON extraction using Claude API; create 3 demo templates (NDA, lease agreement, financial statement); post in legal/accounting LinkedIn groups
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: LLM understands context and ambiguous language in contracts — identifying obligations that keyword-search tools miss and that humans take 30 min each to review

top_opportunities.title: Niche CRM for a Specific Sales Role (e.g., Commercial Real Estate Brokers)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Salesforce is too generic; build a CRM purpose-built for one specific sales persona (commercial RE brokers, insurance agents, SaaS AEs). Include deal flow automation, AI-generated follow-up email drafts, and pipeline analytics. Charge $49-$149/seat. 100 seats = $5k-$15k MRR. Expand via same-industry referrals.
top_opportunities.moat: Deep vertical workflow knowledge creates product-market fit that horizontal CRMs can't replicate easily
top_opportunities.first_step: Pick one sales persona; interview 10 practitioners; identify the top 3 workflow gaps; build mockup and pre-sell to 5 beta users
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI drafts follow-up emails that reference specific deal details from call notes, research the prospect's company before meetings, and flag stale deals

top_opportunities.title: SaaS Churn Prediction & Expansion Revenue Alert Tool
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an analytics layer that connects to Stripe + Mixpanel/Segment. Use ML to identify usage patterns that predict churn (30/60/90 day leading indicators) and flag accounts showing expansion signals. Send Slack/email alerts to CSMs with suggested action. Charge $299-$999/mo to B2B SaaS companies with 100-5,000 customers. Saves 1+ full-time CSM per 500 accounts.
top_opportunities.moat: The longer connected, the more accurate the churn prediction model becomes for that specific product
top_opportunities.first_step: Build Stripe + Mixpanel OAuth integration; create basic logistic regression churn model; demo with 3 SaaS beta customers from your network
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI synthesizes multiple weak signals (support ticket sentiment + login frequency + feature usage + billing events) into a single risk score humans can act on
